title: stanleya pinnata var. inyoensis
intro: Stanleya pinnata var. inyoensis, also known as Inyo Mountain desert pride or Inyo desert pride, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its tall stems and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stanleya pinnata var. inyoensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve for topical use, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
